data.title:
All of the leaders of the top AI Labs have all acknowledged that superhuman AI is an existential threat to humanity 

Elon, Ilya, Altman, Hassabis, Dario

Yet every lab is moving at max speed to accelerate development

We are in quite the conundrum

Probably the only person that disagrees is Yann LeCun who I would characterize as a dumb smart person. You can tell by his consistently wrong takes on everything from AI capabilities/development trajectory to politics.

Llama lagging behind everyone else is no surprise

data.title: 4 reasons why Bitcoin price could rally to $90K in April
data.description:
Key points: Monetary stimulus in China and Europe increases investors’ focus on Bitcoin price. The US Federal Reserve is under political pressure to cut rates, as the DXY weakens. Bitcoin’s decoupling from traditional markets continues to gain attention.  Bitcoin (BTC) traders are somewhat puzzled by BTC price jumping to $85,000, especially since the S&P 500 index has dropped 5
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/4-reasons-why-bitcoin-price-could-rally-to-90-k-in-april?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: U.S. judge rules Google illegally dominated Ad tech markets
data.description:
U. S. District Judge Leonie Brinkema in Virginia issued a 115-page ruling that found Google violated antitrust laws to establish a firm hold over the online advertising space.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/google-illegally-dominated-ad-tech-markets/

Bitcoin futures market shows caution from institutional investors, while retail traders adopt a different approach.

data.title: Ethereum Metric That Historically Precedes Price Rebounds Is Flashing Bullish, Says Analytics Firm Santiment
data.description:
New data from the market intelligence platform Santiment indicates that Ethereum (ETH) may be on the cusp of a breakout. In a new strategy session, the crypto analytics firm says one metric that historically precedes a recovery for the top altcoin is flashing bullish.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/17/ethereum-metric-that-historically-precedes-price-rebounds-is-flashing-bullish-says-analytics-firm-santiment/
